title: catapodium pauciflorum
intro: Catapodium pauciflorum, also known as the few-flowered cat's-foot, is a species of flowering plant in the grass family (Poaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, catapodium pauciflorum is often made into teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
